label: 58_cuts_spending cuts_super committee_tax increases
description: Discussions centered on spending cuts, tax increases, and the role of the super committee in addressing the federal budget deficit. Experts like Isabel Sawhill and William Frenzel debated strategies for deficit reduction while considering their impact on economic growth.

earliest_articles.title: The Scouting Report Web Chat: President Obama’s Budget Proposal
earliest_articles.excerpt: President Obama’s $3.8 trillion budget for the federal government landed on Capitol Hill this week with proposed spending cuts and freezes, increases for defense and homeland security spending, and a new jobs plan – along with a projected deficit of 1.55 trillion for this year.
